evidence.claim: Expertise in Sentence Transformers, Milvus, LoRA, Embeddings, NLP, Time Series, Image Classification, LangChain, ASR, Vector Search, BM25, MLflow, TensorFlow, PEFT, LLMs, Qdrant
evidence.source_text: Skills: Sentence Transformers (expert, 57mo, 60 endorsements); Milvus (advanced, 51mo, 50 endorsements); LoRA (advanced, 24mo, 42 endorsements); Embeddings (expert, 74mo, 16 endorsements); NLP (expert, 79mo, 51 endorsements); Time Series (advanced, 28mo, 14 endorsements); Image Classification (intermediate, 35mo, 15 endorsements); LangChain (expert, 85mo, 15 endorsements); ASR (intermediate, 29mo, 1 endorsements); Vector Search (expert, 82mo, 30 endorsements); BM25 (expert, 87mo, 14 endorsements); MLflow (advanced, 52mo, 33 endorsements); LLMs (advanced, 34mo, 34 endorsements); Qdrant (expert, 76mo, 40 endorsements); PEFT (expert, 74mo, 50 endorsements); TensorFlow (expert, 85mo, 7 endorsements)

evidence.claim: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models using XGBoost and LightGBM
evidence.source_text: Trained and shipped multiple ranking models for our product's discovery feed using XGBoost and LightGBM.

evidence.claim: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow, Kubeflow, and internal feature store
evidence.source_text: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration, and our internal feature store.

evidence.claim: Led team migration from keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Owned offline-online correlation analysis for A/B test metrics
evidence.source_text: Owned the offline-online correlation analysis that determined which offline metrics actually predicted A/B test outcomes.

evidence.claim: Built churn prediction model used by customer success team
evidence.source_text: My main project was a churn prediction model that's now used by the customer success team to prioritize outreach.

evidence.claim: Learned through shipping real systems and production load testing
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Collaborates closely with PMs to define optimization targets
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion) — that work was as important as the modeling itself.
